design_principles: Simplicity and readability above all: No jargon, large text, high contrast.
Error prevention: Clear confirmations, large clickable areas.
One task at a time: Uncluttered layout, linear flows.
Unambiguous feedback: Risk levels must be instantly recognizable.
Never imply certainty: Present results as guidance, not guarantees.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-50
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-50

buttons.primary: w-full h-16 sm:h-20 text-xl font-semibold rounded-2xl bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: w-full h-16 sm:h-20 text-xl font-medium rounded-2xl bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-900 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 dark:text-white border-2 border-transparent transition-all
buttons.explain_easy: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-3 px-8 py-4 text-lg font-medium rounded-full bg-amber-100 text-amber-900 hover:bg-amber-200 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-200 transition-colors

inputs.textarea: w-full min-h-[160px] p-6 text-xl rounded-2xl border-2 border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-600 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-500/20 transition-all resize-none
inputs.text: w-full h-16 px-6 text-xl rounded-2xl border-2 border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-600 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-500/20 transition-all
inputs.label: block mb-3 text-xl font-medium text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100

cards.base: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-10 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] dark:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.1)] border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700

traffic_light.container: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-6 p-8 rounded-3xl bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700
traffic_light.circle: w-24 h-24 sm:w-32 sm:h-32 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner transition-all duration-300
traffic_light.active_low_risk: bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(16,185,129,0.35)] scale-105 border-4 border-white dark:border-slate-800
traffic_light.active_medium_risk: bg-amber-500 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(245,158,11,0.35)] scale-105 border-4 border-white dark:border-slate-800
traffic_light.active_high_risk: bg-red-500 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(239,68,68,0.35)] scale-105 border-4 border-white dark:border-slate-800
traffic_light.active_inconclusive: bg-slate-500 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(100,116,139,0.35)] scale-105 border-4 border-white dark:border-slate-800

images.description: Minimalist digital security shield with a checkmark
3D clay style magnifying glass scanning a text bubble

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scaling (scale-105) for small buttons, background color darkening for large buttons.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast ring focus (ring-4) on all inputs and buttons.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide up (using framer-motion) to avoid jarring changes.
motion_and_interactions.traffic_light_animation: Smooth fade/scale reveal of final result only. Avoid blinking.

ux_rules.history_storage: Use localStorage for anonymous local history.
ux_rules.disclaimer: Esta herramienta ofrece una evaluación orientativa y no garantiza la legitimidad del mensaje.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize accessibility: Do not use font sizes smaller than text-base (16px).
Implement the Traffic Light component visually with four possible states including inconclusive.
Ensure the 'Explícamelo fácil' button is prominent and uses amber/yellow accent.
Keep the interface as a single-page experience with minimal navigation.
Support robust Dark/Light theme toggle with high contrast.
Use simple Spanish text for all user-facing labels.
